infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow CatchMe to access your location to show nearby trips.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow CatchMe to access your location to improve trip suggestions and nearby travel features.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow CatchMe to access your location to enhance trip discovery and nearby features.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow CatchMe to access your location to find nearby trips while you use the app.
